title: RealAI Internship
subtitle: AI security internship in Beijing, 2021
summary: During my research into adversarial examples, I found this interesting company trying to put AI security into industry. So I applied and did an internship there, where I got to know many renowned researcher in this field.

blocks.text: To be honest, I do not really understand what RealAI is trying to do. During my internship, the mentor asked me to think of ways to make adversarial examples for face recognition system physically viable.

The main challenge was that normally we use flat digital images for training and adversarial attacks, while in the physical world, human face is not flat. So I was exploring ways to reliably mapping the unflat face to a flat space.
Overall, I did not accomplish anything meaningful despite got to know the authors of many papers I read and admire.
